allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Stage 0: Rename to IfcViewer + repo relink + buildable skeleton

- Solution renamed: IfcViewer.sln / IfcViewer.csproj
- Assembly: IfcViewer.dll, RootNamespace: IfcViewer
- Build configs: Debug/Release + Debug2024/Release2024/Debug2026/Release2026
- Output paths: DevDlls\\IfcViewer\\2024 and \\2026 \(separate per version\)
- App.cs: ribbon button ''IFC\\nViewer'', tooltip ''Launch the IFC Viewer''
- IfcViewerCommand.cs: modeless window launcher with bring-to-front logic
- IfcViewerWindow.xaml: existing window chrome/styles PRESERVED; viewer
  placeholder \(''Viewer Ready''\) occupies the viewport column \(Stage 1 target\)
- TitleBar: namespace updated to IfcViewer.UI
- SessionLogger: logs to Debug + %ProgramData%\\Autodesk\\Revit\\Addins\\RKTools\\IfcViewer\\Logs- Deploy/*.addin: manifests for Revit 2024 and 2026
- .gitignore: excludes bin/obj/pfx/ProSchedules legacy files
- Remote origin: https://github.com/RaulKalev/Revit.IfcViewer.git

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Stage 0 fix: Exclude legacy template files from build, fix XAML compat

- IfcViewer.csproj: Exclude all ProSchedules legacy Compile/Page items
  so only IfcViewer-namespaced files are compiled
- IfcViewerWindow.xaml: Remove TextTransform \(not available in WPF/.NET 4.8\)
- Fix MSBuild condition operator precedence warning on SignBuild target
- Both net48 \(Revit 2024\) and net8.0-windows \(Revit 2026\) build cleanly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(/tmp/reflect_indices.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
Add-Type -Path 'C:\\Users\\mibil\\.nuget\\packages\\xbim.common\\5.1.289\\lib\\net47\\Xbim.Common.dll' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

# Inspect XbimFaceTriangulation more deeply
$ft = [Xbim.Common.Geometry.XbimFaceTriangulation]

Write-Host "=== All Members of XbimFaceTriangulation ==="
$ft.GetMembers\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Static\) | ForEach-Object {
    Write-Host \($_.MemberType.ToString\(\).PadRight\(12\) + " " + $_.ToString\(\)\)
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== Constructors ==="
$ft.GetConstructors\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\) | ForEach-Object {
    $params = \($_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_.ParameterType.Name + " " + $_.Name }\) -join ", "
    Write-Host \("ctor\(" + $params + "\)"\)
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== XbimFaceTriangulation Indices — what does each index represent? ==="
Write-Host "IsPlanar: if true, face has single normal; if false, per-vertex normals"
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== Private/internal fields ==="
$ft.GetFields\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\) | ForEach-Object {
    Write-Host \("  [private] " + $_.Name + " : " + $_.FieldType\)
}
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/reflect_indices2.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
Add-Type -Path 'C:\\Users\\mibil\\.nuget\\packages\\xbim.common\\5.1.289\\lib\\net47\\Xbim.Common.dll' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$ft = [Xbim.Common.Geometry.XbimFaceTriangulation]

Write-Host "=== Constructors ==="
$ft.GetConstructors\(\) | ForEach-Object {
    $params = \($_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_.ParameterType.Name + " " + $_.Name }\) -join ", "
    Write-Host \("ctor\(" + $params + "\)"\)
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== Private fields ==="
$flags = [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance
$ft.GetFields\($flags\) | ForEach-Object {
    Write-Host \("  " + $_.Name + " : " + $_.FieldType.Name\)
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== All public methods with full signatures ==="
$ft.GetMethods\(\) | ForEach-Object {
    $params = \($_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_.ParameterType.Name + " " + $_.Name }\) -join ", "
    Write-Host \($_.ReturnType.Name + " " + $_.Name + "\(" + $params + "\)"\)
}
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/ilcheck.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
# Use Mono.Cecil or just raw IL via reflection to understand index packing
# Check if ILSpy or ildasm is available
$ildasm = Get-Command ildasm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
if \($ildasm\) { Write-Host "ildasm found: " + $ildasm.Source }
else { Write-Host "ildasm not found in PATH" }

# Check for dotnet-ildasm or similar
$dotnetIl = Get-Command dotnet-ildasm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
if \($dotnetIl\) { Write-Host "dotnet-ildasm found" }
else { Write-Host "dotnet-ildasm not found" }

# Check for ilspy
$ilspy = Get-Command ilspycmd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
if \($ilspy\) { Write-Host "ilspycmd found: " + $ilspy.Source }
else { Write-Host "ilspycmd not found" }

# Try to get IL using built-in .NET
Add-Type -Path 'C:\\Users\\mibil\\.nuget\\packages\\xbim.common\\5.1.289\\lib\\net47\\Xbim.Common.dll' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$ft = [Xbim.Common.Geometry.XbimFaceTriangulation]

# Get the WriteIndices method body as IL bytes
$mi = $ft.GetMethod\('WriteIndices'\)
Write-Host "WriteIndices MethodBody MaxStack: " + $mi.GetMethodBody\(\).MaxStackSize.ToString\(\)
$il = $mi.GetMethodBody\(\).GetILAsByteArray\(\)
Write-Host \("WriteIndices IL length: " + $il.Length.ToString\(\)\)
Write-Host \("First 64 IL bytes: " + \($il[0..63] -join ' '\)\)

$mi2 = $ft.GetMethod\('WriteIndicesAndNormals'\)
$il2 = $mi2.GetMethodBody\(\).GetILAsByteArray\(\)
Write-Host \("WriteIndicesAndNormals IL length: " + $il2.Length.ToString\(\)\)
Write-Host \("First 64 IL bytes: " + \($il2[0..63] -join ' '\)\)
PSEOF)
Bash(# Install ilspycmd as a dotnet tool to decompile the actual method dotnet tool list -g)

Bash(/tmp/inspect_xbim.ps1 << 'HEREDOC'
# Find all xbim packages
$pkgRoot = 'C:\\Users\\mibil\\.nuget\\packages'
$xbimDirs = Get-ChildItem $pkgRoot -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'xbim*' }
Write-Host "=== xBIM packages found ==="
$xbimDirs | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name
HEREDOC)

Bash(/tmp/inspect_xbim2.ps1 << 'HEREDOC'
$pkgRoot = 'C:\\Users\\mibil\\.nuget\\packages'

# Find versions for xbim.common
$commonVer = Get-ChildItem "$pkgRoot\\xbim.common" -Directory | Select-Object -Last 1
Write-Host "xbim.common version dir: $\($commonVer.Name\)"
Get-ChildItem "$\($commonVer.FullName\)\\lib" -Recurse -Filter "*.dll" | Select-Object FullName
HEREDOC)

Bash(/tmp/inspect_xbim3.ps1 << 'HEREDOC'
$pkgRoot = 'C:\\Users\\mibil\\.nuget\\packages'

# Load Xbim.Common net47 first, then ModelGeometry.Scene
$commonDll  = "$pkgRoot\\xbim.common\\5.1.289\\lib\\net47\\Xbim.Common.dll"
$sceneDll   = "$pkgRoot\\xbim.modelgeometry.scene\\5.1.288\\lib\\net47\\Xbim.ModelGeometry.Scene.dll"

# Add a resolve handler so Xbim.Common resolves from our known path
$handler = [System.ResolveEventHandler]{
    param\($s, $e\)
    $name = $e.Name.Split\(','\)[0]
    $candidates = @\(
        "$pkgRoot\\xbim.common\\5.1.289\\lib\\net47\\$name.dll",
        "$pkgRoot\\xbim.ifc4\\5.1.288\\lib\\net47\\$name.dll",
        "$pkgRoot\\xbim.ifc2x3\\5.1.288\\lib\\net47\\$name.dll",
        "$pkgRoot\\xbim.ifc\\5.1.288\\lib\\net47\\$name.dll",
        "$pkgRoot\\xbim.io.memorymodel\\5.1.288\\lib\\net47\\$name.dll",
        "$pkgRoot\\xbim.tessellator\\5.1.288\\lib\\net47\\$name.dll"
    \)
    foreach \($c in $candidates\) {
        if \(Test-Path $c\) {
            return [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\($c\)
        }
    }
    return $null
}
[System.AppDomain]::CurrentDomain.add_AssemblyResolve\($handler\)

$asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\($sceneDll\)
$t = $asm.GetType\('Xbim.ModelGeometry.Scene.Xbim3DModelContext'\)
if \(-not $t\) { Write-Host "Type not found!"; exit }

Write-Host "=== Shape* methods ==="
$t.GetMethods\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'Shape*' } | ForEach-Object {
    $params = \($_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_.ParameterType.Name + ' ' + $_.Name }\) -join ', '
    "$\($_.Name\) \($params\) -> $\($_.ReturnType.Name\)"
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== ALL public instance methods on Xbim3DModelContext ==="
$t.GetMethods\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\) |
    Where-Object { -not $_.IsSpecialName } |
    ForEach-Object {
        $params = \($_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_.ParameterType.Name + ' ' + $_.Name }\) -join ', '
        "$\($_.Name\) \($params\) -> $\($_.ReturnType.Name\)"
    }
HEREDOC)

Bash(Set-Content -Path "C:\\Users\\mibil\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\xbim_inspect.ps1" -Value @'
$dll = 'C:Usersmibil.nugetpackagesxbim.modelgeometry.scene5.1.288libnet47Xbim.ModelGeometry.Scene.dll'
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($dll\)
$asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\)
$t = $asm.GetTypes\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'XbimMeshGeometry3D' }
Write-Host ""Type found: $\($t.FullName\)""
$t.GetMethods\(\) | ForEach-Object {
    $params = \($_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_.ParameterType.Name + ' ' + $_.Name }\) -join ', '
    Write-Host ""$\($_.Name\)\($params\) -> $\($_.ReturnType.Name\)""
}
'@)
